your_edit.header.copy: The more you shop the better we get at recommending what you like, so make sure you check back here for up to date recommendations.

fields.heading: Leggings
fields.description: Step into confidence and feel ready to push yourself to new heights with our workout and gym leggings. Physique-enhancing, sweat-wicking and ultra-comfortable, our leggings will have you feeling just as good on rest days as you do in the gym. Choose from our range of colours, styles, cuts and waistlines, and enjoy performance gym leggings that offer support and effortless style.

fields.title: High Waisted Leggings
fields.description: You move, they stay put.

fields.title: Flared Leggings
fields.description: Our flared leggings are made for every aspiring studio girl

fields.title: Scrunch Butt Leggings
fields.description: They give your glutes a little boost.

fields.title: Short Leggings
fields.description: The best leggings in your actual size.

fields.title: Tall leggings
fields.description: No ankles to see here.

fields.title: Compression Leggings
fields.description: Secure fit from waist to toe.

fields.title: Black Leggings
fields.description: Everyone’s day ones for a reason.

fields.title: Leggings that fit first time?
fields.copy: Our guide helps you pick the right size, fit, and style, with no second guessing.

fields.carouselDescription: Same Whitney, just with a lower waistband. Sculpting, buttery soft and still your go-to.

fields.heading: Sports Bras
fields.description: No matter the workout, our sports bras have your back. Designed to keep you supported and to limit distractions whether you're going for heavy lifts, sweating your way through a HIIT session, or enjoying a rest day. Choose from a range of support options, features and designs to find the perfect workout bra to suit your needs and style.

fields.contentfulLabel: Womens Sports Bras Link Card Carousel

fields.title: Light Support
fields.description: For training with little to no bounce, like yoga, rest day or light lifting.

fields.contentfulLabel: Medium Support Sports Bra Link Card - Fit & Style
fields.title: Medium Support
fields.description: Keeps you comfy & supported for training with a little less bounce.

fields.contentfulLabel: High Support Bra Link Card - Fit & Style
fields.title: High Support
fields.description: For more high impact training like running or HIIT.

fields.contentfulLabel: Minimal Sports Bra Bra Link Card - Fit & Style

fields.title: The Gymshark App
fields.copy: Shop your fave ’fits on the go and get exclusive drops, class bookings and more. The best of Gymshark anytime, anywhere.

fields.title: The Gymshark Training App
fields.copy: From home workouts at your fingertips to an entire library of gym plans, train your way with the Gymshark Training App.

content.value: Ever wish you could save all your fave fits & accessories in one place to come back to later? Almost like a ✨ wishlist ✨.

marketing.heading: Hey, Want Emails You’ll Actually Read?
marketing.paragraph: Here’s why joining the community will be the best decision you’ve made since you landed on our website.

usps.title: Events
usps.text: You’ll be the first to know about exclusive events at GSLC (Gymshark Lifting Club), our Lift events, and any others.

usps.title: Product Drops
usps.text: You’ll get early deets of when new products are gonna launch so you can mark your calendars.

usps.title: Exclusive Content
usps.text: Unlock promotions, discover what makes your Gymshark clothes so great, and learn all the ways you can style your pieces.

usps.title: 10% off
usps.text: And if you’re signing up for the first time, you’ll get 10% off your first order, too.
